item.title: Update: Murciélago Pursuit
item.description: Re-converted mesh due to oversight. Added new horn and engine sounds.

item.title: New Release: Murciélago Pursuit
item.description: New Ryuji car conversion from NFS4- using TheMeandMe's Murciélago as a base.

item.title: Update: Toyota bB (was Scion xB)
item.description: Renamed for accuracy to original model. Mesh was re-converted and repaired!

item.title: Update: Blitz ZZII
item.description: Texture and scale improvements, shadowmap added, new HUL generated.

item.title: Update: Tommy Kaira ZZII
item.description: Texture and scale improvements, shadowmap added, new HUL generated, utilizes ZZII Pro parameters.
